title: salvia vazquezii subsp. vazquezii
intro: Salvia vazquezii subsp. vazquezii is a subspecies of the Salvia vazquezii plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Mexico, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. Salvia vazquezii subsp. vazquezii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine.
